Deprecated API

Contents

  • For Removal
  • Classes
  • Methods
  • Constructors
  • For Removal 
    Element Description
    com.gpudb.BulkInserter.getRetryCount()
    com.gpudb.BulkInserter.setRetryCount​(int)
    com.gpudb.BulkInserter.WorkerList
    This class has been superseded by com.gpudb.WorkerList.
    com.gpudb.BulkInserter.WorkerList()
    This class has been superseded by com.gpudb.WorkerList.
    com.gpudb.filesystem.common.FileOperation.getKifsPathSeparator()  
    com.gpudb.filesystem.GPUdbFileHandler.showDirectories​(Set<String>)  
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo​(URL, List<URL>, Set<String>, URL, boolean)
    Constructor for an active cluster
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.getIsIntraClusterFailoverEnabled()
    Get whether intra-cluster failover is enabled
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.getIsPrimaryCluster()
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.isIntraClusterFailoverEnabled()
    Get whether intra-cluster failover is enabled
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setIsIntraClusterFailoverEnabled​(boolean)
    Set whether this cluster has intra-cluster failover enabled. Return this object to be able to chain operations.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.getClusterReconnectCount()
    Gets the number of times the API tries to reconnect to the same cluster (when a failover event has been triggered), before actually failing over to any available backup cluster.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.getIntraClusterFailoverTimeout()
    Gets the timeout used when trying to recover from an intra-cluster failover event. The value is given in milliseconds. Returns 0.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.setClusterReconnectCount​(int)
    Sets the number of times the API tries to reconnect to the same cluster (when a failover event has been triggered), before actually failing over to any available backup cluster.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.setIntraClusterFailoverTimeout​(long)
    Sets the timeout used when trying to recover from an intra-cluster failover event. The value is given in milliseconds.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.setHostManagerPort​(int)
    As of version 7.1.0.0, this method will no longer be functional. This method will be a no-op, not changing host manager port. The method will be removed in version 7.2.0.0.
    com.gpudb.util.json.JsonUtils.isListOfValidJsonStrings​(List<String>)

    Class Description
    com.gpudb.BulkInserter.WorkerList

    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.getIsIntraClusterFailoverEnabled()
    Get whether intra-cluster failover is enabled
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.getIsPrimaryCluster()
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.isIntraClusterFailoverEnabled()
    Get whether intra-cluster failover is enabled
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setIsIntraClusterFailoverEnabled​(boolean)
    Set whether this cluster has intra-cluster failover enabled. Return this object to be able to chain operations.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.getClusterReconnectCount()
    Gets the number of times the API tries to reconnect to the same cluster (when a failover event has been triggered), before actually failing over to any available backup cluster.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.getIntraClusterFailoverTimeout()
    Gets the timeout used when trying to recover from an intra-cluster failover event. The value is given in milliseconds. Returns 0.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.setClusterReconnectCount​(int)
    Sets the number of times the API tries to reconnect to the same cluster (when a failover event has been triggered), before actually failing over to any available backup cluster.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.Options.setIntraClusterFailoverTimeout​(long)
    Sets the timeout used when trying to recover from an intra-cluster failover event. The value is given in milliseconds.
    com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.setHostManagerPort​(int)
    As of version 7.1.0.0, this method will no longer be functional. This method will be a no-op, not changing host manager port. The method will be removed in version 7.2.0.0.
    com.gpudb.util.json.JsonUtils.isListOfValidJsonStrings​(List<String>)
